interpretation: Stable names and contact fields remain the easiest utility-constrained slice.
Structured identifiers benefit from typed placeholder routing and pattern support.
Clinical context remains recoverable, but task-critical semantics increase residual exposure pressure.
Location spans are partly structured yet still sensitive to context and formatting variation.
Organization-specific spans remain harder because lexical clues overlap with benign task vocabulary.
Context-heavy confidential spans remain the dominant residual-risk channel in CPPB.
